transcript_quality: partial — Granola summary available; full transcript unavailable
lead_profile_text: ABROAD — Property owner vacating for ~7-month overseas trip (Japan, Philippines, Vietnam, Cambodia, Indonesia, Malaysia, Australia, New Zealand). Departing Heathrow 21 Sept 2026; returning last week of April 2027. Employer sabbatical arranged. 2-bed York house: king bedroom + second double with standing desk workspace; smart TVs throughout; garden; driveway (4–5 cars); road parking nearby. Renovation near-complete — minor painting and fence work within 2 weeks of call. STL revenue to cover ongoing property costs and travel expenses.
emotional_profile: Positive and engaged but evaluating competitors. STL is the enabling mechanism for the trip, not income-maximisation. Realistic financial expectations (~£2k/month target). Quality of information provision is her stated differentiator for Stayful.
delay_timeline: Property available from 23 September 2026; onboarding within 3 weeks of move-out date to go live

top_objections.zac_response: Quality and volume of information provided differentiates Stayful

top_questions.text: Are additional safety certifications needed for a temporary STL arrangement?
top_questions.answer: No additional certifications required; new boiler already installed and serviced annually — will be serviced again before departure

what_moved_them: I've really liked the additional information you guys have provided
York case study: comparable 3-bed projected £31k net, actual £35k net — net exceeded projection
Projected net of £2,115/month marginally exceeds her own £2,000/month threshold
Workspace (standing desk) in second bedroom highlighted as competitive advantage for contractor/business traveller guests
what_fell_flat: Nothing flagged — lead was positive throughout

conversion_gaps.gap: Comparing Stayful against competitor companies — she has calls booked with competitors
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: High-quality timely follow-up pack reinforcing information advantage; include clear September prep timeline and explicit note on what happens if she returns early

offer_framing: Agreement sent for review at standard terms; 2-week review window requested
zac_close_phrase: Abby to review within 2 weeks and confirm; onboarding, kickoff call, and photos closer to September with up to 3 weeks from move-out date to go live
zac_income_intro: Projected net revenue of ~£2,115/month (£209/night, 68% occupancy) drawn from comparable established properties nearby
zac_transition_phrases: York is one of the best STL markets in the UK, particularly the north
Amenities (garden, driveway, workspace, smart TVs, location near racecourse and bus stop) offset high local competition
zac_reassurance_phrases: No additional safety certifications needed for a temporary STL arrangement
New boiler already installed and serviced annually — will be serviced again before departure
zac_analogies: Comparable York 3-bed: projected £60k gross/£31k net, actual £55k gross/£35k net — net exceeded projection
